cards.name: 7 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: harvest, rewards, results, growth, progress, perseverance, patience, planning

cards.name: 3 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of cohesion, lack of teamwork, apathy, poor motivation, conflict, ego, competition

cards.name: 4 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of support, instability, feeling unwelcome, transience, lack of roots, home conflict
